title: About
description: Designer & front-end engineer building playful, high-performance interfaces.
body:
const{Fragment:e,jsx:t,jsxs:n}=arguments[0];function _createMdxContent(i){const r={h2:"h2",h3:"h3",img:"img",li:"li",p:"p",strong:"strong",ul:"ul",...i.components};return n(e,{children:[t(r.h2,{children:"Hey, I'm Sivert"}),"
",t(r.p,{children:"I craft immersive interfaces and technical storytelling for forward-thinking teams. My sweet spot lives where product strategy, interaction design, and animation intersect. I obsess over the subtle details: easing curves that feel natural, typography that guides without shouting, and systems that scale gracefully without losing personality."}),"
",t(r.p,{children:t(r.img,{src:"https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1545239351-1141bd82e8a6?auto=format&fit=crop&w=1400&q=80",alt:"Sketching interface flows on a light table"})}),"
",t(r.h3,{children:"What drives me"}),"
",n(r.ul,{children:["
",n(r.li,{children:[t(r.strong,{children:"Motion as language."})," Thoughtful transitions help people build trust and intuition with a product."]}),"
",n(r.li,{children:[t(r.strong,{children:"Full-stack empathy."})," I move comfortably between Figma, TypeScript, and shaders, translating constraints into opportunities."]}),"
",n(r.li,{children:[t(r.strong,{children:"Accessible polish."})," I see no trade-off between sweeping visuals and inclusive experiences."]}),"
"]}),"
",t(r.h3,{children:"How I work"}),"
",t(r.p,{children:"I lead discovery, prototype rapidly, and validate ideas with real users whenever possible. Once we're confident in the direction, I help ship the production implementation—usually in React, powered by frameworks like Vite or Next.js, with design systems tailored for the brand."}),"
",t(r.h3,{children:"Outside the editor"}),"
",t(r.p,{children:"When I'm not animating pixels, you can find me capturing analog photos of Scandinavian coastlines, tinkering with modular synth patches, or curating playlists for late-night creative jams."})]})}return{default:function(e={}){const{wrapper:n}=e.components||{};return n?t(n,{...e,children:t(_createMdxContent,{...e})}):_createMdxContent(e)}};

title: Selected Work
description: Highlights from product launches, immersive prototypes, and motion studies.
body:

",n(i.p,{children:"Over the last few years I've partnered with venture-backed startups, cultural institutions, and research labs to ship expressive digital products. My preferred format is a close partnership with founders or product teams where we iterate quickly, test often, and treat polish as a feature."}),"
